According to the graph data and PDF documentation, the **maximum speed of the MiR 100 is 1.5 m/s** (5.6 km/h or 3.5 mi/h) when operating without load. When carrying its maximum payload of 100 kg, the maximum speed is reduced to 1.0 m/s.
